since_last: 54% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.08%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.10% · BTC +0.45% · Gold +1.80% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 54% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.08%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.08%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.39%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -7.95%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +6.98%, PUBM +5.73%, MGNI +5.31%, RXRX +5.24%, DV +5.08%. Laggards: TER -7.95%, HPE -6.06%, VRT -5.09%, DELL -4.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.54% at $152.18
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.54% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
